description: Ordered sequence of steps, each represented by a tag and a bound Tool UDT. Running the pipeline = writing the first step's status tag RUNNING; the runner then executes each step sequentially, writes its status/duration/output tags, and emits on_transition events that any Script UDT can subscribe to.

on_fail.description: `abort` (default) | `continue` — what to do if a step fails

steps.description: Array of { id, tag, tool_id, inputs?, on_fail? }. Step i's completion fires the transition that runs step i+1.

namespace.description: Tag prefix for every step, e.g. `pipeline.build`
